name: python-devtools
description: Live runtime inspection for any Python app — MCP bridge that lets Codex reach into a running Python process to eval expressions, inspect objects, read source, follow logs, and capture screenshots.

interface.shortDescription: Live runtime inspection for any Python app
interface.longDescription: MCP bridge that lets Codex reach into a running Python process to eval expressions, inspect objects, read source, follow logs, and capture screenshots. Pair with trace-driven development for fast iteration on long-running services.
